creator: lippemail@gmail.com
text:
Hi submitter,

This patch is to an port already present on ports tree, however, the
version of software described on your patch is more newer. Could you
please open other PR with the appropriate update, it's maintained by
gnome@ team on FreeBSD Ports.

Thanks for your contribution to FreeBSD Project! :)

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
